name: White Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 whole chicken breasts, skinned, boned, and cut into 1 inch chunks
1 16 oz can white kidney beans, drained
2 4 oz cans diced mild green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a small saucepan over medium heat, cook onion, garlic, and cumin until onion is tender.
3. In the 2 1/2 quart casserole, combine the onion mixture with chicken, white kidney beans, garbanzo beans, corn, green chiles, bouillon, and 1 1/2 cups water (I use less liquid).
4. Cover casserole and bake for 50-60 minutes until chicken is tender.
5. To serve, stir hot pepper sauce into chili to taste. Serve with shredded cheese on top.
Serves 8. Per serving: Calories 339, Saturated fat: 10g, Total fat: 26g, Carbohydrates: 37g, Sodium 1123 mg, Cholesterol 52 mg.
